headline: Dollar General’s Back-to-School Season Offers Big Value with $1 Every Day Items and Convenient Delivery Options

headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains In-Line on Dollar General, Lowers Price Target to $135
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Michael Montani   maintains Dollar General (NYSE:DG) with a In-Line and lowers the price target from $140 to $135.
